#Get Parameter from controldb
import json
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
db_notebookname= "AEMO_Gold"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
#print(linkedServiceProperties)
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname)

#Source DataLake storage details
source_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
source_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage container detail
source_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #internal folder location in container "demodata/demo_aemo"
#source_file = '' #CUSTOMER__full_32a72bd2-bd94-467f-9030-6b9f20dad676_20240204_100201

#Destination DataLake storage details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw storage container details
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw delta file patch

#Get Current Date
Gold_LoadDate=spark.sql("select current_timestamp()").collect()[0][0]

#Synapse Dedicated Server detials
SynapseDedicatedServer = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['SynapseDedicatedServer'] 
TempFolder = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['TempFolder']
SynapseDedicatedDatabase = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['SynapseDedicatedDatabase']

# Display values
print(source_storage)
print(source_container)
print(source_path)
print(destination_storage)
print(destination_container)
print(destination_path)
print(SynapseDedicatedServer)
print(TempFolder)
print(SynapseDedicatedDatabase)

# Create AEMO Dir if it does not exist
dirs_in_gold =  [f.name for f in mssparkutils.fs.ls(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/")]
if "AEMO" not in dirs_in_gold:
    mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO")

# Create NEM12 Dir if it does not exist 
dirs_in_aemo =  [f.name for f in mssparkutils.fs.ls(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO")]

if "NEM12" not in dirs_in_aemo:
    mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO/NEM12")
# Table FactMeterConsumption: START

#Set table name
db_tablename="FactMeterConsumption"
source_dbname = "aemo_silver"
source_tablename = "nem12_silver"
msats_source_dbname = "msats_silver"
msats_source_tablename = "report_c4_nmi_data"

# Add required imports
import com.microsoft.spark.sqlanalytics
from com.microsoft.spark.sqlanalytics.Constants import Constants
from pyspark.sql.functions import col

# Name of the SQL Dedicated Pool or database where to run the query
# Database can be specified as a Spark Config or as a Constant - Constants.DATABASE
spark.conf.set("spark.sqlanalyticsconnector.dw.database", f"""{SynapseDedicatedDatabase}""")

# Read from a query
# Query can be provided either as an argument to synapsesql or as a Constant - Constants.QUERY
df_readmeter = (spark.read
                     # Name of the SQL Dedicated Pool or database where to run the query
                     # Database can be specified as a Spark Config - spark.sqlanalyticsconnector.dw.database or as a Constant - Constants.DATABASE
                     .option(Constants.DATABASE, f"""{SynapseDedicatedDatabase}""")
                     # If `Constants.SERVER` is not provided, the `<database_name>` from the three-part table name argument
                     # to `synapsesql` method is used to infer the Synapse Dedicated SQL End Point.
                     .option(Constants.SERVER, f"""{SynapseDedicatedServer}""")
                     # Defaults to storage path defined in the runtime configurations
                     .option(Constants.TEMP_FOLDER, (f"""abfss://temp@{TempFolder}/{db_tablename}"""))
                     # query from which data will be read
                     .option(Constants.QUERY, (f"""SELECT MAX([LoadDate]) AS CDC_LoadDate FROM [dbo].[FactMeterConsumption]"""))
                     .synapsesql()
)

# Show contents of the dataframe
#df_readmeter.show()

#Create temp view
df_readmeter.createOrReplaceTempView(f"""Gold_deditemp_{db_tablename}""")

#Gold load dates
df_Latest_LoadDate = spark.sql(f"""
                        SELECT date_format(CDC_LoadDate,'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSSSS') AS Latest_LoadDate FROM
                            Gold_deditemp_{db_tablename};
                    """)
#display(df_Latest_LoadDate)

if df_Latest_LoadDate.count() > 0 and df_Latest_LoadDate.collect()[0][0] != None:
    gold_loaddate = df_Latest_LoadDate.collect()[0][0]
else:
    gold_loaddate = '1900-01-01 00:00:00.000000'
print(gold_loaddate)

df_gold = spark.sql(f"""SELECT * FROM 
                                    (SELECT
                                        aemo.Nem12HashKey,
                                        aemo.CDC_LoadDate AS LoadDate,
                                        aemo.UpdateDateTime,
                                        aemo.MSATSLoadDateTime,
                                        aemo.CreationDate,
                                        aemo.VersionHeader,
                                        aemo.CreationDate,
                                        aemo.FromParticipant,
                                        aemo.ToParticipant,
                                        aemo.IntervalDate, 
                                        aemo.IntervalLength,
                                        aemo.IntervalIndex,
                                        aemo.Timestamp,
                                        aemo.DisplayTimestamp_d,
                                        aemo.DateHashId, 
                                        aemo.NormalizedTimeStart,
                                        aemo.NormalizedTimeEnd,
                                        aemo.TimeHashId,
                                        aemo.NMI,
                                        aemo.NMIHashId,
                                        aemo.NMIConfiguration,
                                        aemo.RegisterID,
                                        aemo.NMISuffix,
                                        aemo.ChannelHashId,
                                        aemo.ReasonCodeId,
                                        aemo.ReasonCodeHashId,
                                        aemo.ReasonDescription,
                                        aemo.FinalReasonDescription,
                                        aemo.FinalReasonCodeId, 
                                        aemo.FinalReasonCodeHashId,
                                        aemo.TransCodeId,
                                        aemo.TransCodeHashId,
                                        aemo.UnitOfMeasurementId,
                                        aemo.UnitOfMeasurementHashId,
                                        aemo.QualityMethodId,
                                        aemo.QualityFlag,
                                        aemo.QualityFlagHashId,
                                        aemo.MethodFlag,
                                        aemo.MethodFlagHashId, 
                                        aemo.FinalQualityMethodId,
                                        aemo.FinalQualityFlag,
                                        aemo.FinalQualityFlagHashId,
                                        aemo.FinalMethodFlag, 
                                        aemo.FinalMethodFlagHashId,
                                        aemo.MDMDataStreamIdentifier,
                                        aemo.MeterSerialNumber, 
                                        aemo.NextScheduledReadDate, 
                                        aemo.MSATSLoadDateTime,  
                                        aemo.RetServiceOrder, 
                                        aemo.ReadDatetime,
                                        aemo.IndexRead,
                                        aemo.Usage_d, 
                                        aemo.Usage,
                                        aemo.FileName,
                                        msats.report_status_id, 
                                        msats.sequence_number,
                                        msats.row_status, 
                                        msats.from_date, 
                                        msats.to_date, 
                                        msats.tni, 
                                        msats.distribution_loss_factor, 
                                        msats.parent_embedded_network_identifier, 
                                        msats.child_embedded_network_identifier,
                                        msats.status,
                                        RANK () OVER (PARTITION BY aemo.nmi, aemo.Timestamp ORDER BY msats.report_status_id DESC) AS MSATSRank
                                    FROM {source_dbname}.{source_tablename} aemo 
                                    LEFT JOIN {msats_source_dbname}.{msats_source_tablename} msats 
                                        ON aemo.nmi = msats.nmi AND aemo.timestamp BETWEEN msats.from_date AND msats.to_date
                                        ) TEMP
                        WHERE TEMP.MSATSRank = 1

#rowcount
factmeter_rowcount = df_gold.count()
print(factmeter_rowcount)

# Add CDC columns
from pyspark.sql import functions as fn
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp,current_timestamp,date_format
from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws

#New HashDiff for Gold
df_gold = df_gold.withColumn('Nem12HashDiff', sha2(concat_ws("||","UpdateDateTime","MSATSLoadDateTime","CreationDate","VersionHeader","FromParticipant","ToParticipant","IntervalDate","IntervalLength","IntervalIndex","Timestamp","DisplayTimestamp_d","NormalizedTimeStart","NormalizedTimeEnd","NMI","NMIConfiguration","RegisterID","NMISuffix","ReasonCodeId","ReasonDescription","FinalReasonCodeId","FinalReasonDescription","TransCodeId","UnitOfMeasurementId","QualityMethodId","QualityFlag","MethodFlag","FinalQualityMethodId","FinalQualityFlag","FinalMethodFlag","MDMDataStreamIdentifier","MeterSerialNumber","NextScheduledReadDate","RetServiceOrder","ReadDatetime","IndexRead","Usage_d","Usage","FileName","report_status_id","sequence_number","row_status","from_date","to_date","tni","distribution_loss_factor","parent_embedded_network_identifier","child_embedded_network_identifier","status"),256))

spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
(
    Nem12HashKey STRING,
    Nem12HashDiff STRING,
    LoadDate TIMESTAMP,
    UpdateDateTime STRING,
    MSATSLoadDateTime STRING,
    CreationDate STRING,
    VersionHeader STRING,
    FromParticipant STRING,
    ToParticipant STRING,
    IntervalDate STRING, 
    IntervalLength DOUBLE,
    IntervalIndex INT,
    Timestamp TIMESTAMP,
    DisplayTimestamp_d STRING, 
    DateHashId STRING, 
    NormalizedTimeStart STRING,
    NormalizedTimeEnd STRING,
    TimeHashId STRING,
    NMI STRING,
    NMIHashId STRING,
    NMIConfiguration STRING,
    RegisterID STRING,
    NMISuffix STRING,
    ChannelHashId STRING,
    ReasonCodeId STRING,
    ReasonCodeHashId STRING,
    ReasonDescription STRING,
    FinalReasonDescription STRING,
    FinalReasonCodeId STRING, 
    FinalReasonCodeHashId STRING,
    TransCodeId STRING,
    TransCodeHashId STRING,
    UnitOfMeasurementId STRING,
    UnitOfMeasurementHashId STRING,
    QualityMethodId STRING,
    QualityFlag STRING,
    QualityFlagHashId STRING,
    MethodFlag STRING,
    MethodFlagHashId STRING, 
    FinalQualityMethodId STRING,
    FinalQualityFlag STRING,
    FinalQualityFlagHashId STRING,
    FinalMethodFlag STRING, 
    FinalMethodFlagHashId STRING,
    MDMDataStreamIdentifier STRING,
    MeterSerialNumber STRING, 
    NextScheduledReadDate STRING, 
    RetServiceOrder STRING, 
    ReadDatetime STRING,
    IndexRead STRING,
    Usage_d DOUBLE, 
    Usage DOUBLE,
    FileName STRING,
    report_status_id LONG,
	sequence_number INT,
	row_status STRING,
	from_date TIMESTAMP,
	to_date TIMESTAMP,
	tni STRING,
	distribution_loss_factor STRING,
	parent_embedded_network_identifier STRING,
	child_embedded_network_identifier STRING,
	status STRING
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'
""")
# Row count parameters
Gold_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} """).collect()[0][0]

if factmeter_rowcount > 0:
    # Create a temporary view of the dataframe
    df_gold.createOrReplaceTempView(f"""Gold_{db_tablename}""")

    # Use insert operation to update the target table
    spark.sql(f""" 

    INSERT INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} 
        SELECT                    
                Nem12HashKey,
                Nem12HashDiff,
                LoadDate,
                UpdateDateTime,
                MSATSLoadDateTime,
                CreationDate,
                VersionHeader,
                FromParticipant,
                ToParticipant,
                IntervalDate,
                IntervalLength,
                IntervalIndex,
                Timestamp,
                DisplayTimestamp_d,
                DateHashId,
                NormalizedTimeStart,
                NormalizedTimeEnd,
                TimeHashId,
                NMI,
                NMIHashId,
                NMIConfiguration,
                RegisterID,
                NMISuffix,
                ChannelHashId,
                ReasonCodeId,
                ReasonCodeHashId,
                ReasonDescription,
                FinalReasonDescription,
                FinalReasonCodeId,
                FinalReasonCodeHashId,
                TransCodeId,
                TransCodeHashId,
                UnitOfMeasurementId,
                UnitOfMeasurementHashId,
                QualityMethodId,
                QualityFlag,
                QualityFlagHashId,
                MethodFlag,
                MethodFlagHashId,
                FinalQualityMethodId,
                FinalQualityFlag,
                FinalQualityFlagHashId,
                FinalMethodFlag,
                FinalMethodFlagHashId,
                MDMDataStreamIdentifier,
                MeterSerialNumber,
                NextScheduledReadDate,
                RetServiceOrder,
                ReadDatetime,
                IndexRead,
                Usage_d,
                Usage,
                FileName,
                report_status_id,
                sequence_number,
                row_status,
                from_date,
                to_date,
                tni,
                distribution_loss_factor,
                parent_embedded_network_identifier,
                child_embedded_network_identifier,
                status
                    FROM Gold_{db_tablename};

column_order = [
    "Nem12HashKey",
    "Nem12HashDiff",
    "VersionHeader",
    "FromParticipant",
    "ToParticipant",
    "IntervalDate", 
    "IntervalLength",
    "IntervalIndex",
    "Timestamp",
    "DisplayTimestamp_d",
    "DateHashId", 
    "NormalizedTimeStart",
    "NormalizedTimeEnd",
    "TimeHashId",
    "NMI",
    "NMIHashId",
    "NMIConfiguration",
    "RegisterID",
    "NMISuffix",
    "ChannelHashId",
    "ReasonCodeId",
    "ReasonCodeHashId",
    "ReasonDescription",
    "FinalReasonCodeId", 
    "FinalReasonCodeHashId",
    "FinalReasonDescription",
    "TransCodeId",
    "TransCodeHashId",
    "UnitOfMeasurementId",
    "UnitOfMeasurementHashId",
    "QualityMethodId",
    "QualityFlag",
    "QualityFlagHashId",
    "MethodFlag",
    "MethodFlagHashId", 
    "FinalQualityMethodId",
    "FinalQualityFlag",
    "FinalQualityFlagHashId",
    "FinalMethodFlag", 
    "FinalMethodFlagHashId",
    "MDMDataStreamIdentifier",
    "MeterSerialNumber", 
    "NextScheduledReadDate", 
    "UpdateDateTime",
    "MSATSLoadDateTime", 
    "RetServiceOrder", 
    "ReadDatetime",
    "IndexRead",
    "Usage_d",
    "Usage",
    "FileName",
    "report_status_id",
	"sequence_number",
	"row_status",
	"from_date",
	"to_date",
	"tni",
	"distribution_loss_factor",
	"parent_embedded_network_identifier",
	"child_embedded_network_identifier",
	"status",
    "LoadDate",
    "CreationDate"

if factmeter_rowcount > 0:
    # Write using AAD Auth to internal table
    # Add required imports
    import com.microsoft.spark.sqlanalytics
    from com.microsoft.spark.sqlanalytics.Constants import Constants
    from pyspark.sql.functions import *

    df_gold = df_gold.withColumn("LoadDate",col("LoadDate").cast("Timestamp"))

    #order columns for Azure Synapse insert should match synapse table creation order.
    df_gold=df_gold.select(*column_order)

    # Configure and submit the request to write to Synapse Dedicated SQL Pool
    # Sample below is using AAD-based authentication approach; See further examples to leverage SQL Basic auth.
    (df_gold.write
    # If `Constants.SERVER` is not provided, the `<database_name>` from the three-part table name argument
    # to `synapsesql` method is used to infer the Synapse Dedicated SQL End Point.
    .option(Constants.SERVER, f"""{SynapseDedicatedServer}""")
    # Like-wise, if `Constants.TEMP_FOLDER` is not provided, the connector will use the runtime staging directory config (see section on Configuration Options for details).
    .option(Constants.TEMP_FOLDER, (f"""abfss://temp@{TempFolder}/{db_tablename}"""))
    # Choose a save mode that is apt for your use case.
    # Options for save modes are "error" or "errorifexists" (default), "overwrite", "append", "ignore".
    # refer to https://spark.apache.org/docs/latest/sql-data-sources-load-save-functions.html#save-modes
    .mode("overwrite")
    # Required parameter - Three-part table name to which data will be written
    .synapsesql(f"""{SynapseDedicatedDatabase}.dbo.{db_tablename}"""))
Gold_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]
#Row calculation
Gold_TotalRows = Gold_TotalRowCount_Post

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Gold_LoadDate,Gold_TotalRows,0,0,Gold_TotalRows,Gold_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

#Write to controldb
import json
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")
# Table FactMeterConsumption: END
